subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor triggers due to recent activity of RX J0440.9+4431 (LS V +44 17)
body:
J.Mangan (CNRS/IJCLab), C. Malacaria (ISSI), J. Wood (NASA/MSFC), O.J. Roberts (USRA)
report on behalf of the Fermi-GBM Team:

"We report that the following list of Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) triggers
tentatively classified as GRBs, are in fact not GRBs. We believe these triggers are due to
LS V +44 17 / RX J0440.9+4431, a source that has been recently brightening and will
likely produce more triggers in the following days."

Date and Time UTC               Fermi MET(s)
2023-02-04 13:08:00.74      697208885 (GCN #33258)
2023-02-03 06:35:25.27      697098930
